title: Rainbow
sourceNotes: 26 episodes, single season. Manga complete at 235 chapters across 22 volumes. The manga's story is split into four chronological parts (1955-56, 1957-58, 1960-64, and 1953-55/1964-68); per Japanese fan sources the anime finale ends partway through Crime 118 (vol. 12), the close of Part 2 (1957-58), leaving Parts 3-4 unadapted. Chapter boundary is approximate (mid-chapter cutoff rounded to the chapter start).
